title: Small Cap Value Dividend Yield Compression Fade
thesis: When IWN dividend yield compresses by 15%+ from 12-month high in a 10-day window, it signals overheating rotation out of value into momentum that typically mean-reverts within 2-3 weeks. Value yield compression followed by mean reversion creates tactical long opportunities in financials and small-cap industrial leaders.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily price and dividend data for IWN (Russell 2000 Value) via price_only adapter
signal_logic: When IWN dividend yield drops 15% from 12-month rolling high within 10 days
entry_exit: Entry: When IWN dividend yield drops 15% from 12-month rolling high within 10 days Exit: After 12 trading days or when yield rebounds to within 10% of previous peak
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily price and dividend data for IWN (Russell 2000 Value) via price_only adapter via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Dividend yield volatility in small-cap value is common; compressions occur 1-2 times per month in normal markets.

schema.idea: Small Cap Value Dividend Yield Compression Fade

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily price and dividend data for IWN (Russell 2000 Value) via price_only adapter

schema.behavior: When IWN dividend yield compresses by 15%+ from 12-month high in a 10-day window, it signals overheating rotation out of value into momentum that typically mean-reverts within 2-3 weeks.

market_impact.rationale: Value yield compression followed by mean reversion creates tactical long opportunities in financials and small-cap industrial leaders.

trade_logic.entry: When IWN dividend yield drops 15% from 12-month rolling high within 10 days
trade_logic.exit: After 12 trading days or when yield rebounds to within 10% of previous peak

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Dividend yield volatility in small-cap value is common; compressions occur 1-2 times per month in normal markets.

title: Health Insurance Deductible Shock Searches
thesis: Spikes in insurance deductible and medical billing searches, especially in January and post-open enrollment, signal consumer health cost stress and reduced discretionary spending. Rising health cost anxiety compresses consumer discretionary budgets and spending confidence.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly searches for 'high deductible health plan' and 'medical bill payment plans'
signal_logic: When combined search volume for deductible/payment plan searches exceeds 8-week average by 35%
entry_exit: Entry: When combined search volume for deductible/payment plan searches exceeds 8-week average by 35% Exit: After 10 trading days or when searches fall below 1.5x baseline
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly searches for 'high deductible health plan' and 'medical bill payment plans' via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Health cost searches spike predictably post-enrollment and at fiscal year boundaries; 2-3 spikes per year minimum.

data.source: Google Trends weekly searches for 'high deductible health plan' and 'medical bill payment plans'

schema.behavior: Spikes in insurance deductible and medical billing searches, especially in January and post-open enrollment, signal consumer health cost stress and reduced discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Rising health cost anxiety compresses consumer discretionary budgets and spending confidence.

trade_logic.entry: When combined search volume for deductible/payment plan searches exceeds 8-week average by 35%
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when searches fall below 1.5x baseline

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Health cost searches spike predictably post-enrollment and at fiscal year boundaries; 2-3 spikes per year minimum.

title: Freight Rate Volatility Expansion Crush
thesis: When freight rate volatility (rolling 4-week standard deviation) expands beyond 2-sigma above 12-month mean, it signals supply chain chaos that pressures industrial inputs but lifts logistics and rail operators. Elevated freight volatility boosts pricing power for transportation and logistics firms while signaling demand uncertainty.
data_sources: FRED Cass Freight Index (CASS) weekly levels via fred_series adapter
signal_logic: When 4-week freight rate volatility exceeds 12-month mean + 2 standard deviations
entry_exit: Entry: When 4-week freight rate volatility exceeds 12-month mean + 2 standard deviations Exit: After 6 trading days or when volatility reverts below mean + 1.5 sigma
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use FRED Cass Freight Index (CASS) weekly levels via fred_series adapter via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight volatility expands 2-3 times per month during seasonal demand swings or supply shocks.

data.source: FRED Cass Freight Index (CASS) weekly levels via fred_series adapter

schema.behavior: When freight rate volatility (rolling 4-week standard deviation) expands beyond 2-sigma above 12-month mean, it signals supply chain chaos that pressures industrial inputs but lifts logistics and rail operators.

market_impact.rationale: Elevated freight volatility boosts pricing power for transportation and logistics firms while signaling demand uncertainty.

trade_logic.entry: When 4-week freight rate volatility exceeds 12-month mean + 2 standard deviations
trade_logic.exit: After 6 trading days or when volatility reverts below mean + 1.5 sigma

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight volatility expands 2-3 times per month during seasonal demand swings or supply shocks.

title: Renewable Energy Rss News Volume Surge
thesis: When weekly renewable energy news story counts spike 50%+ above 12-week moving average, it correlates with policy announcements, funding approvals, and sector rotation momentum. Renewable energy news volume spikes often precede clean tech capex cycles and utility renewable procurement announcements.
data_sources: RSS/news feed counts for clean energy, solar, and wind keywords via rss_count adapter, weekly aggregation
signal_logic: When weekly clean energy RSS count exceeds 12-week average by 50% or more
entry_exit: Entry: When weekly clean energy RSS count exceeds 12-week average by 50% or more Exit: After 10 trading days or when story count reverts to baseline
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use RSS/news feed counts for clean energy, solar, and wind keywords via rss_count adapter, weekly aggregation via scrape (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Renewable energy news volume is volatile and tied to policy cycles; spikes occur 2-4 times per quarter.

schema.idea: Renewable Energy RSS News Volume Surge

data.source: RSS/news feed counts for clean energy, solar, and wind keywords via rss_count adapter, weekly aggregation

schema.behavior: When weekly renewable energy news story counts spike 50%+ above 12-week moving average, it correlates with policy announcements, funding approvals, and sector rotation momentum.

market_impact.rationale: Renewable energy news volume spikes often precede clean tech capex cycles and utility renewable procurement announcements.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly clean energy RSS count exceeds 12-week average by 50% or more
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when story count reverts to baseline

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Renewable energy news volume is volatile and tied to policy cycles; spikes occur 2-4 times per quarter.

title: Travel Booking Momentum Divergence
thesis: When last-minute travel search interest exceeds early-booking interest by >20%, it signals price-sensitive consumer behavior and margin compression in hospitality and airlines. Last-minute booking spikes indicate weak demand visibility and pricing power erosion in leisure and hospitality.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'last minute hotel deals' and 'flight price alerts'
signal_logic: When last-minute travel searches exceed advance-booking searches by 20% over 2-week window
entry_exit: Entry: When last-minute travel searches exceed advance-booking searches by 20% over 2-week window Exit: After 8 trading days or when booking pattern normalizes
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search volume for 'last minute hotel deals' and 'flight price alerts' via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel search seasonality creates regular booking pattern divergences; occurs 2-3 times per month.

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'last minute hotel deals' and 'flight price alerts'

schema.behavior: When last-minute travel search interest exceeds early-booking interest by >20%, it signals price-sensitive consumer behavior and margin compression in hospitality and airlines.

market_impact.rationale: Last-minute booking spikes indicate weak demand visibility and pricing power erosion in leisure and hospitality.

trade_logic.entry: When last-minute travel searches exceed advance-booking searches by 20% over 2-week window
trade_logic.exit: After 8 trading days or when booking pattern normalizes

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel search seasonality creates regular booking pattern divergences; occurs 2-3 times per month.

title: Ev Charger Deployment Sprint Acceleration
thesis: EV charger installation rates spike quarterly when federal or state incentive windows open, signaling infrastructure investment demand and energy sector capex momentum. EV charging infrastructure expansion directly correlates with energy transition capex and utility modernization demand.
data_sources: OpenChargeMap API daily charger count growth across US networks
signal_logic: When weekly charger count growth exceeds 3-month rolling average by 40% or more
entry_exit: Entry: When weekly charger count growth exceeds 3-month rolling average by 40% or more Exit: After 10 trading days or when growth falls back to 3-month average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use OpenChargeMap API daily charger count growth across US networks via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Charger deployment cycles are predictable and tied to incentive program rollouts; growth surges occur 2-4 times per year.

data.source: OpenChargeMap API daily charger count growth across US networks

schema.behavior: EV charger installation rates spike quarterly when federal or state incentive windows open, signaling infrastructure investment demand and energy sector capex momentum.

market_impact.rationale: EV charging infrastructure expansion directly correlates with energy transition capex and utility modernization demand.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly charger count growth exceeds 3-month rolling average by 40% or more
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when growth falls back to 3-month average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Charger deployment cycles are predictable and tied to incentive program rollouts; growth surges occur 2-4 times per year.

title: Consumer Staples Relative Weakness Reversion
thesis: When XLP underperforms SPY by 2%+ over 7 trading days while VIX remains <20, it signals defensive crowding followed by tactical rotation back to beaten-down risk assets. Staples underperformance in low-VIX environments typically reverts as risk appetite returns.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily returns for XLP and SPY via price_only adapter
signal_logic: If XLP lags SPY by >2% over 7 days AND VIX <20 AND XLP shows intra-day bounce
entry_exit: Entry: If XLP lags SPY by >2% over 7 days AND VIX <20 AND XLP shows intra-day bounce Exit: After 6 trading days or when XLP outperforms SPY over 2 consecutive days
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily returns for XLP and SPY via price_only adapter via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Staples/market relative weakness occurs in 40% of rolling 7-day windows; frequent tactical reversal opportunity.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily returns for XLP and SPY via price_only adapter

schema.behavior: When XLP underperforms SPY by 2%+ over 7 trading days while VIX remains <20, it signals defensive crowding followed by tactical rotation back to beaten-down risk assets.

market_impact.rationale: Staples underperformance in low-VIX environments typically reverts as risk appetite returns.

trade_logic.entry: If XLP lags SPY by >2% over 7 days AND VIX <20 AND XLP shows intra-day bounce
trade_logic.exit: After 6 trading days or when XLP outperforms SPY over 2 consecutive days

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Staples/market relative weakness occurs in 40% of rolling 7-day windows; frequent tactical reversal opportunity.

title: Earthquake Swarm Insurance Demand Spike
thesis: Clusters of seismic activity in populated areas trigger insurance claim inquiry spikes and reinforce re-insurance pricing pressure, shifting capital to insurers and risk management firms. Earthquake swarms increase insurance underwriting activity, loss reserve adjustments, and reinsurance demand.
data_sources: USGS Earthquake Activity API daily magnitude 3.0+ events by region
signal_logic: When a region records 5+ magnitude 3.0+ earthquakes within 7 days
entry_exit: Entry: When a region records 5+ magnitude 3.0+ earthquakes within 7 days Exit: After 8 trading days or when seismic activity drops to <2 events per week
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use USGS Earthquake Activity API daily magnitude 3.0+ events by region via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic clusters occur regularly; US averages 1-2 significant swarms per month in active zones.

data.source: USGS Earthquake Activity API daily magnitude 3.0+ events by region

schema.behavior: Clusters of seismic activity in populated areas trigger insurance claim inquiry spikes and reinforce re-insurance pricing pressure, shifting capital to insurers and risk management firms.

market_impact.rationale: Earthquake swarms increase insurance underwriting activity, loss reserve adjustments, and reinsurance demand.

trade_logic.entry: When a region records 5+ magnitude 3.0+ earthquakes within 7 days
trade_logic.exit: After 8 trading days or when seismic activity drops to <2 events per week

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic clusters occur regularly; US averages 1-2 significant swarms per month in active zones.

title: Manufacturing Job Posting Surge Rebound Trade
thesis: When manufacturing job postings spike 25%+ week-over-week, it signals capital equipment orders and production ramp expectations 4-6 weeks ahead. Manufacturing hiring surges precede earnings beats and capex announcements in industrial and materials sectors.
data_sources: Indeed.com job posting counts via html_table scrape, manufacturing category weekly
signal_logic: When weekly manufacturing job postings exceed prior week by 25% or more
entry_exit: Entry: When weekly manufacturing job postings exceed prior week by 25% or more Exit: After 15 trading days or when postings drop 15% week-over-week
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Indeed.com job posting counts via html_table scrape, manufacturing category weekly via scrape (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Manufacturing job posting volatility is seasonal; 3-4 spikes per year as factories ramp for demand cycles.

schema.idea: Manufacturing Job Posting Surge Rebound Trade

data.source: Indeed.com job posting counts via html_table scrape, manufacturing category weekly

schema.behavior: When manufacturing job postings spike 25%+ week-over-week, it signals capital equipment orders and production ramp expectations 4-6 weeks ahead.

market_impact.rationale: Manufacturing hiring surges precede earnings beats and capex announcements in industrial and materials sectors.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly manufacturing job postings exceed prior week by 25% or more
trade_logic.exit: After 15 trading days or when postings drop 15% week-over-week

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Manufacturing job posting volatility is seasonal; 3-4 spikes per year as factories ramp for demand cycles.
